identity.tagline: A voice that found its way forward.
identity.shortBio: Draft: Cody is developing a public voice rooted in lived experience, community, and inclusion.
identity.longBio: Draft only. Cody's origin story and public biography require Cody's review and approval before use.

strategy.purpose: Draft: create space for Cody's own public message and invitations to community conversation.
strategy.keyMessage: Draft: lived experience belongs in public conversations.
supportingMessages: Use Cody's own words whenever possible.
Make ideas understandable without flattening them.
strategy.desiredAudienceResponse: Draft: listen, connect, and invite Cody into an appropriate community conversation.

voice.summary: Draft: direct, warm, bold, reflective, accessible, and grounded in Cody's agency.

traits.name: Direct
traits.description: Say what matters in clear language.
traits.do: Use concrete words and short sentences.
traits.dont: Hide the point behind institutional language.

traits.name: Self-directed
traits.description: Cody's perspective and approval lead the story.
traits.dont: Speak for Cody or turn him into a symbol.

toneByContext.story: Draft: personal and reflective without forcing a neat inspirational arc.
toneByContext.invitation: Draft: open and specific about ways to connect.
toneByContext.sensitiveTopics: Use Cody-approved language. Avoid pity, diagnosis-first framing, medical claims, and details Cody has not chosen to share.

writingRules.sentenceStyle: Short, concrete sentences with one main idea at a time.
accessibilityNotes: Avoid idioms when a direct phrase works.

messaging.originStory: Draft placeholder requiring Cody's review: what happened, what changed, and why Cody chooses to speak now.
messaging.publicMessage: Draft placeholder requiring Cody's own words and approval.
personalBoundaries: Do not publish private history without Cody's approval.
Do not frame Cody through pity or an inspirational stereotype.

approvedCallsToAction.label: Invite Cody to Connect
approvedCallsToAction.description: Draft CTA intent only. Any destination remains admin-owned.

photoStyle.summary: Draft: candid documentary portraits, public voice, speaking, and community moments.

visualDirection.accessibilityIntent: Prioritize plain language, generous type, strong contrast, clear focus, and minimal motion.

governance.notes: Draft model only. This file does not authorize a Cody route, page, navigation item, or template.
